name: github-backlog-management
description: GitHub-native backlog automation. Manage Issues + Projects v2 with AI-enforced INVEST quality, dependency tracking, and one-command execution.

permission_mode.title: Permission mode
permission_mode.description: yolo = no prompts on gh/git during multi-step commands. safe = read-only gh calls run silently, writes still prompt. off = manage permissions manually (no auto-write).
